lang.description: Default form language according to ISO 639-1 standard

loader.description: Indicate whether to show loader when building form

errorMessage.description: Indicate whether to show an error if the Payer completes the form incorrectly

amount.description: Transaction amount expressed in lowest currency unit, e.g. 1.23 PLN = 123

currency.description: Transaction currency in accordance with ISO

channel.description: Indicate which payment channels are to be available on the form</br>  1 - cards

c2p.description:
Available Click to Pay payment in form.
Click to Pay is an extension of the current card payment method, allowing card details to be stored in one secure place - the payer profile. Read more
IMPORTANT!:
There will be a blocking of card enrollment in permanent mode (e.g., for recurring payments) if the payer logs his profile in Click to Pay.

size.description: Object that modifies the size of the iFrame

width.description:
Width
IMPORTANT!:
Sending less than the minimum value will cause a form generation error. In such a situation, a fail event will be sent.

height.description: The height of the iFrame. By default, it will adjust to the content presented in the iFrame

agreement.description: Object responsible for visibility of Przelewy24 regulations

contentEnabled.description: Object that modifies the visibility of elements

enabled.description: Indicate whether the rules of Przelewy24 are to be displayed

checkboxEnabled.description: Indication of whether the displayed regulations require confirmation by the Payer

TOSLanguage.description: Defines in which language the text of the terms of service in ISO 639-1 will be displayed.

agreement_save_card.description: Object responsible for visibility of Merchant's regulations

contentEnabled.description: Object that modifies the visibility of elements

enabled.description: Indicate whether Merchant's regulations are to be displayed

checkboxEnabled.description:
Indicate whether the displayed regulations require confirmation by the Payer
IMPORTANT!:
With Click to Pay enabled, it is not possible to present Merchant's terms and conditions without requiring the Payer to confirm them (no checkbox). Attempting to set this up will result in a form generation error. A fail event will be returned. For the moment, the Payer can save the card either to Click to Pay or with Merchant.

labels.description: Text modification object visible as label of fields

cardholder.description:
Text visible as a cardholder field label
IMPORTANT!:
Send more than the maximum value will cause a form generation error. In this situation, a fail event will be passed.
cardholder.example: Name and surname of the cardholder

card.description:
Text visible as label of card number field
IMPORTANT!:
Send more than the maximum value will cause a form generation error. In this situation, a fail event will be passed.

cvv.description:
Text visible as the label of the field of CVV/CVC number of the card
IMPORTANT!:
Send more than the maximum value will cause a form generation error. In this situation, a fail event will be passed.

exp.description:
Text visible as label of card expiration date field
IMPORTANT!:
Send more than the maximum value will cause a form generation error. In this situation, a fail event will be passed.

placeholders.description: Object that modifies the text visible in each element

card.description: Text visible in the card element

cvv.description: Text visible in the cvv element

exp.description: Text visible in the expire date element

cardholder.description: Text visible in the cardholder element
cardholder.example: Enter the name and surname of the cardholder

buttons.description:
The object that enables the configuration of buttons in a card form.
IMPORTANT!:
By default, buttons are not available in iFrame.

tokenize.description:
The object responsible for configuring a button to permanently save card data, which in the future can be used for loads using another library Read more
IMPORTANT!:
At this moment there is no possibility to save permanent card data if the Payer will use Click to Pay. Work is in progress to provide such functionality.

label.description:
The text shown on the button
IMPORTANT!:
Send more than the maximum value will cause a form generation error. In this situation, a fail event will be passed.

tokenize_temporary.description: Object responsible for configuring a button to temporarily save card data for later loading using another library Read more

label.description:
The text shown on the button
IMPORTANT!:
Send more than the maximum value will cause a form generation error. In this situation, a fail event will be passed.

font.description: Object that modifies the font of the form

basic.description: Font configuration relating to the whole form

size.description: Size expressed in px, em, rem

family.description: Font family specified after the comma (without spaces). All Google fonts are supported.

color.description: Font color (option to indicate in HEX or in words)

error.description: Configure the font for the error

color.description: Font color (option to indicate in HEX or in words)

agreement.description: Configure the font for the TOS (Terms Of Services) field.

family.description: Font family specified after the comma (without spaces). All Google fonts are supported.

color.description: Font color (option to indicate in HEX or in words)

link.description: Specifies the font color of the link to the regulations and information obligation (possibility to indicate in HEX or in words)

visited.description: Specifies the font color of the link to the regulations and information obligation that has already been visited (option to indicate in HEX or in words)

active.description: Specifies the font color of the link to the regulations and information obligation on which the mouse cursor is just located (possibility to indicate in HEX or in words)

focus.description: Configure the font during element activation

color.description: Font color (option to indicate in HEX or in words)

placeholders.description: Configure the font for the text visible in each element

color.description: Font color (option to indicate in HEX or in words)

colors.description: Object that modifies the font color for an individual element.

card.description: Font color in the card element

cvv.description: Font color in the cvv element

exp.description: Font color in the exp element

cardholder.description: Font color in the cardholder element

border.description: Obiekt modyfikujący krawędź dla poszczególnego elementu

basic.description: Edge modification object for a specific element

form.description: Edge styles for the form element

agreement_checkbox.description: Object that modifies the colors for the TOS (Terms Of Services) checkbox.

colorSelected.description: Color of the checkbox when selected

width.description: Width and height of the checkbox

checkboxes.description: Object that modifies the colors for the checkbox

colorSelected.description: Color of the checkbox when selected

width.description: Width and height of the checkbox

background.description: Object that modifies the background color for an individual element

basic.description: Background color for all input type elements

form.description: Background color for the form element

additional.description: Additional configuration of padding and margin for individual form elements

inputs.description: Applies to all text inputs in the form

paddingTop.description: Specifies the internal spacing between the top edge of the element and its content.

paddingRight.description: Specifies the internal spacing between the right edge of the element and its content.

paddingBottom.description: Specifies the internal spacing between the bottom edge of the element and its content.

paddingLeft.description: Specifies the internal spacing between the left edge of the element and its content.

marginTop.description: Specifies the external spacing between the top edge of the element and surrounding elements

marginRight.description: Specifies the external spacing between the right edge of the element and surrounding elements

marginLeft.description: Specifies the external spacing between the left edge of the element and surrounding elements
